desc: Creates a TextNote in the active view at user-provided XY coordinates (in mm).
summary: Creates a TextNote in the active view at user-provided XY coordinates (in mm). Optionally targets a named TextNoteType via ListText.GetTextNoteType; falls back to ListText.GetDefaultTextNoteType when no type is specified. Uses CommandExecutor.GetParameter for AI-resolved inputs.
usecase: User wants to place a text annotation on a plan or section view.
notfor: Creating keynotes or tags (use tagging commands). Not for sheet title blocks.
precondition: Active view must support text notes (not a schedule, legend, or 3D view).
postcondition: A new TextNote element exists in the active view at the specified location.

outputs.name: Result
outputs.description: Created text note id, view, textType, and placement coordinates

preprompts: Placing a text note in the active view...
thinkingsteps: Converting mm coordinates to internal units...
successprompts: Text note placed in {view} at ({x}, {y}) mm
Done — text note created using type "{textType}"
